full_text:
An update for libinput is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

libinput is a library that handles input devices for display servers and other applications that need to directly deal with input devices.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [libinput] Backport Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen to RHEL9 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-105483)
